name: Montego Bags O' Wags Mega Dog Treats - Marrow Bone (30CM/1PC) 120g
description: BAGS O’ WAGS Megachews – Beef Flavoured Marrow Bones (30cm) A chewmungous treat packed with flavour and nutrition! BAGS O’ WAGS Megachews are the ultimate reward for large dogs who love to chew! These 30cm beef-flavoured marrow bones feature a soft, meaty centre that’s wagtastically irresistible. Whether you're training or just showing some love, these tasty treats are perfect for any occasion. Crafted with high-quality ingredients and packed with nutritional goodness , Megachews support your dog’s wellbeing while satisfying their natural chewing instincts. Key Benefits Super-sized (30cm) treat ideal for large breeds Soft, meaty centre dogs love High in protein to support muscle maintenance Great as a training reward or daily treat Promotes chewing for dental health and stimulation Ingredients: Corn starch, poultry meal, water, glycerine, milk powder (lactose reduced), propylene glycol, wheat gluten, sugars, chicken fat, sodium hexametaphosphate, spray-dried animal plasma, sodium tripolyphosphate, fish oil, carrageenan. Additives (/kg): Sensory: Palatability meat-based enhancers with beef aroma, white and brown colourants. Crude protein 15% Moisture 16.5% Total fat 5.5% TYPICAL ANALYSIS Crude fibre 1% Sodium 5% Metabolisable energy 342 kcal/lOO g Give your dog a long-lasting , deliciously beefy chew that delivers both joy and nourishment, because they deserve the best!
